scope: single-seed no-training 16-state FP32/BF16 stability qualification of the fixed 1024x power-of-two scaled exact coordinate readout; no optimizer step, production mutation, hyperparameter search, checkpoint, H1b-H6, tensor, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT

decision_rule.pass: authorize exactly one same-seed 16-state 1024-step scaled variable-projection test with scale 1024, solve interval 16, rcond 1e-10 and no ridge or search
decision_rule.fail: reject scaled variable projection before training because power-of-two parameter scaling does not stabilize the effective readout function/backbone gradient; retain the compact production head and require a separately frozen basis-decorrelation mechanism
decision_rule.boundary: This no-training audit cannot qualify H1a, mutate production, initialize a checkpoint, add steps or seeds, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
